prompt:
A lunar observation sheet on A5 paper showing a hand-drawn crater rim with shaded interior and directional lighting marks. A telescope eyepiece, pencil, and small clipboard nearby make it clearly a structured moon-observation record rather than casual doodling.

Photorealistic 512×512 image with soft warm field lighting, realistic paper and graphite texture, no logos, no readable labels, and no identifiable faces. Keep the page centered and uncluttered.
